page: Microsoft Azure EC32eds_v5 is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance belonging to the ECEDV5 family. It is built on the x86_64 architecture and features 32 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel processor. The instance is configured with 256.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core.

This virtual machine includes 957 GB of local storage and is capable of utilizing Premium Storage. It operates on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The instance does not include any integrated GPU hardware or complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the EC32eds_v5 offers a high density of memory relative to compute resources, making it a viable option for workloads that require large in-memory datasets without the overhead of additional CPU cores. The inclusion of local storage provides a high-speed scratch space or caching layer, reducing the need for external storage transactions. This server type is designed for memory-intensive workloads, including relational database servers, in-memory caches, data analytics engines, and enterprise applications.
description: Microsoft Azure EC32eds_v5 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the ECEDV5 family, designed for resource-intensive enterprise workloads. Powered by an Intel processor on the x86_64 architecture, this instance features 32 dedicated vCPUs and 256.0 GB of RAM, establishing a high 8.0 GB per core memory-to-vCPU ratio. It is equipped with 957 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage configurations, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The server does not include dedicated GPU hardware or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. From a qualitative cost-efficiency standpoint, the high memory density and integrated local storage minimize the need for external storage transactions for caching. This hardware profile is suited for memory-heavy applications, including relational databases, in-memory data analytics, large-scale caching layers, and enterprise-grade workloads requiring substantial memory capacity.
og_description: Microsoft Azure EC32eds_v5 is a memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 32 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 256 GB of RAM, and 957 GB of local storage, designed for database and in-memory workloads.

tagline: A memory-optimized virtual machine featuring high memory density, dedicated Intel processors, and integrated local storage for demanding enterprise workloads.
